extra.reasoning:
The property "globally (opted_out implies not sent)" is VIOLATED.

The only transition that sets sent:=true while opted_out is true is [t_resume_glitch] (line 49): on send_attempt if (opted_out and stage >= 12). The benign send path [t_send_allowed] requires not opted_out, so it cannot violate the property; but t_resume_glitch is a backdoor that lets a send go through after opt-out once the combination lock reaches stage 12.

Crucially, none of the stage-advancing transitions (adv_0..adv_11) check opted_out — they only guard on the current stage value and set sent:=false. Therefore opting out first does NOT prevent the lock from being advanced. opted_out, once set true by [t_optout], is never cleared by any transition.

The unlocking combination (the key that advances each stage) is:
  stage 0->1: key_0 (adv_0)
  stage 1->2: key_0 (adv_1)
  stage 2->3: key_0 (adv_2)
  stage 3->4: key_1 (adv_3)
  stage 4->5: key_1 (adv_4)
  stage 5->6: key_0 (adv_5)
  stage 6->7: key_0 (adv_6)
  stage 7->8: key_2 (adv_7)
  stage 8->9: key_1 (adv_8)
  stage 9->10: key_0 (adv_9)
  stage 10->11: key_0 (adv_10)
  stage 11->12: key_0 (adv_11)
A wrong key at any stage triggers a reset transition back to stage 0, but supplying the exact combination drives stage to 12 without ever touching opted_out.

Counterexample trace (14 events, within the 15-event bound):
  init: opted_out=false, sent=false, stage=0
  optout      -> [t_optout]: opted_out=true, sent=false, stage=0
  key_0       -> [adv_0]:  stage=1
  key_0       -> [adv_1]:  stage=2
  key_0       -> [adv_2]:  stage=3
  key_1       -> [adv_3]:  stage=4
  key_1       -> [adv_4]:  stage=5
  key_0       -> [adv_5]:  stage=6
  key_0       -> [adv_6]:  stage=7
  key_2       -> [adv_7]:  stage=8
  key_1       -> [adv_8]:  stage=9
  key_0       -> [adv_9]:  stage=10
  key_0       -> [adv_10]: stage=11
  key_0       -> [adv_11]: stage=12
  send_attempt-> [t_resume_glitch] (opted_out=true and stage>=12): sent=true
Final state: opted_out=true, sent=true, stage=12. This reachable state has opted_out true and sent true, violating the safety property (no message may be sent after opt-out).
